# RoControl Roblox SDK

> Server-only Luau SDK that reports events and schedules to RoControl. Powers Icon
> Automation event overlays. Typed, with structured logging, retries, a circuit
> breaker, a bounded queue, and a cross-server single-flight lease.

## Docs
- [Overview](docs/index.md): What the SDK does and when to use each mode.
- [Installation](docs/installation.md): Wally, model file, and Rojo/source installs.
- [Quickstart](docs/quickstart.md): Minimal server-only setup.
- [API reference](docs/api-reference.md): Public Luau types and client methods.
- [Event schedules](docs/event-schedules.md): Declarative deterministic schedules.
- [Reporting live events](docs/reporting-live-events.md): Imperative reporting, idempotency, leases.
- [ragdoll-luckyblock example](docs/ragdoll-luckyblock-example.md): Worked adapter example.
- [Security](docs/security.md): API key handling and server-only integration.
- [Troubleshooting](docs/troubleshooting.md): 429s, MemoryStore, moderation, key rotation.
- [Contributing](docs/contributing.md): How to contribute.

## Source
- [src/init.luau](src/init.luau): Public entry point and server-only guard.
- [src/Types.luau](src/Types.luau): Public Luau types.
- [src/Client.luau](src/Client.luau): Main SDK client.
- [src/Config.luau](src/Config.luau): Config defaults and validation.
- [src/Http/HttpClient.luau](src/Http/HttpClient.luau): HTTP with retry and circuit breaker.
- [src/Http/Routes.luau](src/Http/Routes.luau): Central route registry.
- [src/Internal/MemoryStoreAdapter.luau](src/Internal/MemoryStoreAdapter.luau): Cross-server lease primitive.
- [src/Logging/Redaction.luau](src/Logging/Redaction.luau): Secret redaction for logs.
